title: Calendar detail variants — left/right collapsible panel showing day items
description: Two new variants: detail-left and detail-right. Single month calendar with a collapsible side panel that shows events for the selected day. Click a day to see its items. Panel collapses to a thin strip.
resolution: Added detail-left and detail-right variants. Calendar grid + collapsible side panel. Panel shows events filtered by selected date. readList reads from data.events slot. Structure styles in safestyles.
